lines: Excuse me, only employees are allowed... oh.
Of course. The new hire. Dr. A. Cula, good morning! We've been expecting you.
Mr. Pig mentioned you'd be starting today. He mentioned it several times, actually.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: He's at his desk. He'll want to speak with you first.

lines: Then, you'll want to pick up your blue folder. It's on the second pile from the left. Mr. Murrow put a sticky note on it. The sticky note says 'Cula' and nothing else, which is how you know it's from Mr. Murrow.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: The archive is through that door, and Mr. Murrow is in there with the case file whenever you're ready for him.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: [A young woman. Incredibly busy. Hopefully friendly.]

choices.text: Good morning. Dr. A. Cula, reporting for duty.
Good morning, you must be Asia? I saw you on the website. Cula, the new hire. Pleasure to meet you.
Dr. A Cula, here to see Mr. Pig.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: Dr. A. Cula. Good morning. We've been expecting you — well, Mr. Pig has been expecting you. I've been expecting the courier, but you're here first.

lines: Oooh no, I told them not to upload that picture, I was hungover that day! I'm sorry, I meant to say...

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: Dr. A. Cula, good morning! We've been expecting you.

lines: Dr. A. Cula, good morning! We've been expecting you.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: Mr. Pig mentioned you'd be starting today. He mentioned it several times, actually.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: You should talk to him first, he'll want to say hello. He's the loudest crisis in the room.

lines: Then, you'll want to pick up your blue folder. It's on the second pile from the left. Mr. Murrow put a sticky note on it. The sticky note says 'Cula' and nothing else, which is how you know it's from Mr. Murrow.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: The archive is through that door, and Mr. Murrow is in there with the case file whenever you're ready for him.

lines: Mr. Murrow will know what the case is actually about. Mr. Pig knows what it feels like, which is different and louder.
You found it? Excellent. Please do not put it on my desk; the reception counter has not been load-tested.

idle_flavor: I have filed three motions, answered five calls, and labelled a sandwich urgent. We are having a very productive collapse.
Mr. Pig panics. Mr. Murrow thinks. Crab suspects. Whimsy performs. I schedule the apocalypse.
If anyone asks, the office is running smoothly. If no one asks, please bring me the blue folder.
The sandwich in the fridge labelled 'ASIA — TUESDAY' is mine. The label is clear. The label has always been clear.
Ah — Dr. A. Cula. I'm just on the phone. One moment.
One moment — yes. The calendar. No, the other calendar.
